resultRows.groupTitle: Digestive disorders and gut health boundary context
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived MCM6/LCT rs4988235 CT call is available for lactase-persistence context. This is not a digestive-disorder diagnosis, microbiome result, symptom explanation, diet recommendation, supplement recommendation, lab interpretation, or treatment result.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker can provide lactose-related context, but digestive disorders and gut-health questions require separate evidence, symptom history, diet history, labs, and professional review.

resultRows.sourceLabel: MedlinePlus DTC result limits / Nutritional genomics review
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can describe supplied marker context, but it should not make digestive diagnosis, microbiome, symptom, diet, supplement, lab, or treatment conclusions without validated evidence.

digestiveDisordersGutHealthContext: Use this report as educational nutrition-genetics context, not as a digestive-disorder diagnosis or microbiome result.
Bring symptoms, food history, labs, microbiome questions, digestive diagnosis questions, and nutrition goals to qualified professionals when relevant.
Do not eliminate foods, start supplements, interpret labs, or change treatment based on genotype alone.

uncertainty: Digestive disorders, microbiome status, digestive symptoms, and food response require broader clinical, dietary, laboratory, and professional context.

A single marker should not be used to diagnose digestive disorders, infer microbiome status, explain symptoms, prescribe diets or elimination diets, recommend supplements, interpret labs, or guide treatment.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not diagnose digestive disorders, infer microbiome status, diagnose lactose intolerance, diagnose celiac disease, infer IBS or IBD status, explain symptoms, prescribe diets or elimination diets, recommend supplements, interpret labs, or provide treatment guidance.
